title: row — one real-world entity in one table
description: Values are keyed by the owning table's column keys; null means unknown. Every non-null value must have a provenance entry — a source URL, or a stated basis such as 'user' (OVERVIEW rules 2, 4, 5). Conformance of values to the owning table's columns is a cross-record rule enforced by tools/validate.py integrity_checks().

values.description: column key → typed value (text: string · number · date: YYYY-MM-DD string · boolean · select: one of the column's options), or null for unknown.

provenance.description: column key → source URL or stated basis, for every non-null value.

researched.description: When this row's values were last verified against live sources.
